scope.target: Resolve static-only versus static-or-sealed Mapper policy
constraints: Preserve Mapper as a conversion responsibility.
Do not permit Repository, UseCase, Handler, I/O, or business orchestration dependencies.

execution_steps: Present both Mapper policy options and tradeoffs.
Record the selected option in the requirement and Mapper standard.
validation: Requirement and standard state one consistent policy
Automated Pattern markers do not contradict normative text
